recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
recommendations.overview: The Secret Magic Control Agency sends its two best agents, Hansel and Gretel, to fight against the witch of the Gingerbread House.

recommendations.title: Wifelike
recommendations.overview: A grieving detective in the near-future hunts down criminals who trade artificial humans on the black market. In the fight to end AI exploitation, an underground resistance attempts to infiltrate him by sabotaging the programming of the artificial hu

recommendations.title: Alien Hunter
recommendations.overview: Government agents find evidence of extraterrestrial life at the South Pole.

recommendations.title: The Creator
recommendations.overview: Amid a future war between the human race and the forces of artificial intelligence, a hardened ex-special forces agent grieving the disappearance of his wife, is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI who ha

recommendations.title: Demon Seed
recommendations.overview: A scientist creates Proteus, an organic supercomputer with artificial intelligence which becomes obsessed with human beings, and in particular the creator's wife.

recommendations.title: Morgan
recommendations.overview: A corporate risk-management consultant must determine whether or not to terminate an artificial being's life that was made in a laboratory environment.

recommendations.title: Outlander
recommendations.overview: During the reign of the Vikings, a man from another world crash-lands on Earth, bringing with him an alien predator. The man must fuse his advanced technology with the weaponry of the vikings to fight the monster.

recommendations.title: The Pod Generation
recommendations.overview: In a not-so-distant future, couples can share pregnancy on a more equal footing via detachable artificial wombs. While botanist Alvy has doubts about this new way of birthing babies, his love for Rachel prompts him to take a leap of faith.

recommendations.title: Companion
recommendations.overview: During a weekend getaway at a secluded lakeside estate, a group of friends finds themselves entangled in a web of secrets, deception, and advanced technology. As tensions rise and loyalties are tested, they uncover unsettling truths about themselves
